sections.paragraph:
- Original: γράμμα

- Transliteration: Gramma

- Phonetic: gram'-mah

- Definition:

1. a letter

2. any writing, a document or record

a. a note of hand, bill, bond, account, written acknowledgement of a debt

b. a letter, an epistle

c. the sacred writings (of the OT)

3. letters, i.e. learning

a. of sacred learning

- Origin: from G1125

- TDNT entry: 13:41,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G1125; a writing that is a letter note epistle book etc.; plural learning: - bill learning letter scripture writing written.
